LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAMES R. BINASKI'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $120.00 TO THE PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR COURT COSTS AND TO RELEASE THE REMAINDER BALANCE TO THE DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR. (ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976. (302)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Jul-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court's tentative ruling required a hearing on this matter. There being no appearance, the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT JAMES R. BINASKI'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release $120.00 to the plaintiff/ judgment creditor for court costs and to release the remainder balance to the defendant/ judgment debtor. (ORDER SIGNED after hearing.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
